title: The Tortoise and the Hare
content:
One day, a hare saw a tortoise walking slowly down the road.

"You are so slow!" laughed the hare. "I am the fastest animal around!"

The tortoise smiled. "Let's have a race," he said.

The hare laughed again. "A race? You will lose!"

They started to race. The hare ran very fast. Soon, he was far ahead.

"I am so fast," said the hare. "I will take a little nap."

The hare lay down under a tree and fell asleep.

The tortoise kept walking. Slow and steady. Step by step.

When the hare woke up, he saw the tortoise near the finish line!

The hare ran as fast as he could. But it was too late.

The tortoise won the race!

"Slow and steady wins the race," said the tortoise.

The End.

author: Aesop
